# Serpely — Agentic SEO for the AI-First Web

## What is Serpely?

Serpely is an agentic SEO platform built for the AI-first web. It helps brands get found, cited, and trusted by AI engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews — not just traditional Google Search.

Serpely combines traditional SEO (rank tracking, technical audits, backlink analysis) with next-generation AI visibility tools: GEO Scoring, AI Citation Monitoring, Hallucination Alerts, and an autonomous content pipeline.

## Who is it for?

- SEO teams at growing companies wanting to maintain visibility as AI search takes over
- Digital marketing agencies managing SEO for multiple clients
- AI-first startups that need to rank in both Google and LLM-driven search
- Enterprise brands requiring white-label reporting and advanced AI visibility tracking

## Core Features

- **GEO Score**: Every page scored 0–100 for AI visibility and citation eligibility. Updates daily.
- **AI Citation Monitor**: Tracks whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews are citing your content.
- **Hallucination Alerts**: Detects when AI engines return inaccurate information about your brand. Includes severity scores and fix recommendations.
- **Daily Rank Tracking**: Keyword rankings across Google and AI-driven search engines with real-time alerts.
- **Technical Site Audit**: Continuous audit of Core Web Vitals, crawl issues, indexing gaps, and schema errors.
- **Content Prioritization**: Ranks which pages need refresh most, scored by traffic decay, GEO Score, and keyword movement.
- **Backlink Monitoring**: New and lost backlinks with authority scoring.
- **White-Label Reporting**: Client-ready dashboards and automated reports under your brand.

## How It's Different from Semrush / Ahrefs / Moz

Legacy SEO tools were built for Google's 10 blue links. Serpely is the only platform built from the ground up for the AI-first search landscape. Key differentiators:
- Only platform with GEO Scoring (generative engine optimization scoring)
- Only platform with AI Citation Monitoring across all major LLMs
- Agentic AI that actively fixes SEO issues — not just reports them
- Starts free ($0/month), fraction of the cost of Semrush ($119/mo) or Ahrefs ($99/mo)

## Pricing

- **Starter**: Free — 100 keywords, 1 website, basic rank tracking, weekly audits, GEO Score read-only
- **Professional**: $49/month (or $39/month billed annually) — 1,000 keywords, 5 websites, daily tracking, full GEO dashboard, API access, AI Citation Monitor
- **Business**: $99/month (or $79/month billed annually) — unlimited keywords, unlimited websites, real-time tracking, white-label reports, dedicated account manager

All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
